headline: Universal Music stock rises after Pershing Square's $64 billion takeover proposal
summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.

raw.headline: Universal Music stock rises after Pershing Square's $64 billion takeover proposal
raw.summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square said Universal Music's stock price has "languished" due to a range of issues that can be addressed with the merger.

headline: European stocks finish lower as Iran war deadline unsettles markets
summary: European stocks retreated Tuesday as investors braced themselves ahead of President Trump's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.

raw.headline: European stocks finish lower as Iran war deadline unsettles markets
raw.summary: European stocks retreated Tuesday as investors braced themselves ahead of President Trump's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz.
